steps.title: Multiply the first equation by 3
steps.content:
Take the first equation and multiply both sides by 3:
$$3(0.5x + 1.2y) = 3(9)$$
$$1.5x + 3.6y = 27$$
This is exactly the second equation, so the two equations are identical.

steps.title: Interpret: identical equations have infinitely many solutions
steps.content: When two equations in a system are identical, they represent the same line in the coordinate plane. Every point on the line satisfies both equations. Therefore, the system has infinitely many solutions. That matches choice A — A is correct.
